title: Skill System v4 Conformance — Fixes 1 & 2 + CLAUDE.md Update
context: OPERATOR_PROFILE.md v4 (BAR-126) codified the block format constant and five elements. The skill-creator SKILL.md predates this and uses only three validators. CLAUDE.md has no reference to OPERATOR_PROFILE.md or SKILLS_SYSTEM.md as locked/governed files. This packet covers Fix 1 (skill-creator Tier 0), Fix 2 (skill-creator compliance gate), and CLAUDE.md update. Fix 3 (reformat 8 existing skills) is a separate follow-on task.
instructions: TASK 1 — Skill-Creator Fix 1: Tier 0 Update
File: skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md
Action: Replace the 'Layer 0 Doctrine' section (lines ~11-17 approx)
Current text references 'Three Validators' (IMO/CTB/Circle)
Replace with 'Five Elements' matching OPERATOR_PROFILE.md v4 Tier 0:
1. C&V — The OBJECTIVE. Separate fixed from changing.
2. IMO — The PROCESS. Does it hold regardless of what flows through?
3. CTB — The HIERARCHY. Does it hold at every level?
4. Hub-and-Spoke — The PHYSICAL MODEL. Is the rim/spoke/hub separation clean?
5. Circle — The VALIDATION. Does it hold after a full feedback cycle?
Update Block 2 (Constant Extraction) validation steps to reference all five elements instead of three
Do NOT change any other blocks — content is solid, only the validator list needs updating
TASK 2 — Skill-Creator Fix 2: Compliance Gate Awareness
File: skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md
Action: Add to Block 6 (Rules & Boundaries) a new rule:

'Every skill must declare its audit mechanism. Ask: How does output from this skill get validated? If the skill produces output that reaches a human or downstream system, it must declare whether it uses self-check only, cross-check (different LLM), human review, or a combination. This maps to OPERATOR_PROFILE.md Block 6 three-tier enforcement. Not every skill needs all three tiers — but every skill must answer the question.'
Also add to Block 1 (Domain Scope) a third entry question:
'How does this skill validate its output?' — in addition to 'What triggers this?' and 'How do we get it?'
TASK 3 — CLAUDE.md Update: Add Governing Documents
File: CLAUDE.md
Action: In the LOCKED FILES section, add a NEW subsection after 'Prompt and Skills Bay (CONSTITUTIONAL)':
### Operator Profile (HUMAN AUTHORITY ONLY)
| File | Purpose |
| `docs/OPERATOR_PROFILE.md` | Document of documents — operator constants, block format, five elements, compliance gate. HUMAN AUTHORITY ONLY — no LLM may modify. |
### Skills System Governance
| File | Purpose |
| `skills/SKILLS_SYSTEM.md` | Skills governance — three tiers (agent/master/car), directory layout, creation rules |
| `skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md` | Skill creation engine — 10-block constant-extraction pipeline for producing new skills |
Also add to the GOLDEN RULES section (after rule 7):
8. **OPERATOR_PROFILE.md is the document of documents. It conforms to nothing. All other documents conform to it.**
9. **Skills use the block format. Five elements validate every constant.**
constraints: Do NOT reformat any of the 8 existing agent/platform skills — that is a separate task
Do NOT change skill-creator blocks other than Layer 0 Doctrine, Block 1, Block 2, and Block 6
Do NOT modify OPERATOR_PROFILE.md — it is HUMAN AUTHORITY ONLY
Do NOT push to remote — local commit only
Commit message: BAR-130: Skill-creator v4 conformance (fixes 1-2) + CLAUDE.md governing docs
verification: skill-creator/SKILL.md references five elements (C&V, IMO, CTB, Hub-and-Spoke, Circle) not three validators
skill-creator Block 2 validation uses all five elements
skill-creator Block 6 includes audit mechanism rule
skill-creator Block 1 includes third entry question about output validation
CLAUDE.md LOCKED FILES has OPERATOR_PROFILE.md listed as HUMAN AUTHORITY ONLY
CLAUDE.md LOCKED FILES has SKILLS_SYSTEM.md and skill-creator listed
CLAUDE.md GOLDEN RULES has rules 8 and 9 added
